core_mechanism: Analytic continuation of the solutions of a combinatorially/toric-data-determined system of linear hypergeometric partial differential equations (a GKZ system) across a parameter space, tracking the monodromy and degeneration of those solutions at the special point where multiple branches of the discriminant (singular) locus coincide, so that the coalescence exposes the full root system of a Lie algebra rather than only its generating (simple) elements.
brief_reason: The abstract states the whole analysis 'involves an explicit solution of the GKZ system of the local geometry' and that continuing these solutions to the point where all n(n-1)/2 branches of the discriminant locus coincide is what reveals all positive roots of A_{n-1} rather than just the simple roots.
